inputs.tags: A cinematic and epic orchestral track that builds intense momentum for a grand narrative. The piece opens with deep, thunderous percussion and rhythmic taiko drums, layering in staccato strings and a powerful brass section that conveys a sense of heroic duty. As the arrangement swells, soaring choral chants and sweeping violins create a feeling of sacrifice and ultimate glory. The production is vast and atmospheric, featuring high dynamic range and a driving, march-like energy perfect for a high-stakes battle or a dramatic trailer climax, evoking a mood of solemnity and triumphant resilience.
inputs.lyrics:
[en]
[Intro]
(Low brass hum, distant drums pounding)
The shadows rise across the ancient land.

[Verse 1]
Through the ashes of the fallen sky
We march beneath the banners held on high
No turning back, the embers start to glow
Against the tide where silver rivers flow
The weight of crowns, the cost of every breath
We walk the line between the light and death.

[Chorus]
Rise from the silence, the glory and the pain
For every hero born in iron and rain
The world will tremble, the heavens will cry
Our names are written in the burning sky
Eternal fire, the spirit never dies.

[Verse 2]
The sword is heavy but the will is strong
We carry echoes of a forgotten song
Beyond the gates where destiny awaits
We challenge gods and master our own fates
A single spark to light the darkest night
The final stand, the dawn of holy light.

[Chorus]
Rise from the silence, the glory and the pain
For every hero born in iron and rain
The world will tremble, the heavens will cry
Our names are written in the burning sky
Eternal fire, the spirit never dies.

[Outro]
(Epic choral swell)
Victory... in the silence...
Glory... remains.
(Final thunderous drum hit)
